notes: m8_nudge_log table verified live in Supabase (7 cols, 2 indexes).
Real tone buckets logged: welcome|urgent|awareness|keepItUp|appreciation|reEngage (spec's warn/push/encourage were illustrative). trigger_reason derived deterministically per bucket.

logNudge(db,...) takes an optional {sbFetch} seam; defaults to the module's env-based Supabase REST (same pattern as morning-brief.js/notify.js). nudges.js calls logNudge(null,...) and awaits Promise.allSettled so inserts complete on serverless; fully SAFE (never throws/blocks the drafts).
Nudge activity line attached via computeLiveBrief() -> covers the chat morning brief + on-demand email.
gaps: 6 AM cron email (api/morning-brief.js) calls generateMorningBrief() directly, not computeLiveBrief(), so the weekly Nudge Activity line is NOT in the scheduled email yet. api/morning-brief.js was outside this build's file scope. One-line follow-up: `await attachNudgeActivity(brief)` before saveBrief() in api/morning-brief.js.

SECURITY: m8_nudge_log has RLS disabled (consistent with the project's other tables — driver_cost_profiles, m8_conjecture_outcomes, m8_morning_briefs — which rely on the service key, not RLS). Not auto-fixed; surfaced to Muhammad.
